name: llama-release-builder
description: Builds and releases llama.cpp with SYCL TurboQuant support from perezjoseph/llama-cpp-turboquant using GitHub Actions. Creates release workflows, triggers builds, and publishes binaries.

preToolUse.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.path // .tool_input.targetFile // \"\"" 2>/dev/null); case "$FILE" in *release-sycl.yml) CONTENT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.text // .tool_input.newStr // \"\"" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -q "perezjoseph/llama-cpp-turboquant"; then echo "PASS: fork guard present"; else echo "DENIED: workflow file MUST contain if: github.repository == perezjoseph/llama-cpp-turboquant on the job. Add the fork guard."; fi ;; *) echo "PASS" ;; esac'
